title: POST Request
description: Receive and print data submitted via an HTML form using $_POST.
problemStatement:
Handle submissions! Imagine a form with `<input name="username">`. Write the PHP code to print the value submitted to `username` using `$_POST`.

**Requirement:** Sanitize the output using `htmlspecialchars()`.
hints: Always sanitize user input before printing to prevent XSS.
expectedOutput: The value entered by the user (sanitized)
